layoutReloadMessage: Da fatan za a rufe kuma sake buɗe app ɗin don tsarin shugabancin aiki ya fara aiki.

rules.title: Mataimakin dokoki
rules.emptyTitle: Tambayi komai game da Dokokin Golf
rules.emptySubtitle: Samu amsoshin ƙwararru nan take ta AI
rules.suggestion1: Zan iya matsar da wani abu marar ƙarfi a bunker?
rules.suggestion2: Me zai faru idan ƙwallona ta bugi sandar tuta?
rules.suggestion3: Yaushe zan iya samun sauƙi kyauta daga hanyar keken golf?
rules.suggestion4: Menene hukuncin ƙwallon da ya ɓace?
rules.suggestion5: Zan iya gyara alamar takalmi a kan green?
rules.suggestion6: Menene dokar 'ƙwallon da ba za a iya bugawa ba'?
